sentences.english: I love being alone, it's when I feel most creative.
sentences.korean: 혼자 있는 게 좋아요. 가장 창의적으로 느끼는 때거든요.

sentences.english: I need to be around people most of the time, but even I need a few hours alone each week.
sentences.korean: 대부분 사람들 곁에 있어야 하지만 나도 매주 몇 시간은 혼자 시간이 필요해요.

sentences.english: When I'm alone, I usually go for long walks or listen to music.
sentences.korean: 혼자 있을 때 보통 긴 산책을 하거나 음악을 들어요.

sentences.english: It's my way of clearing my head.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
